style_guide.title: Unified Visual Identity
style_guide.description: Use this art direction consistently across every asset.

assets.prompt:
Design a premium hero animation for the landing page of an AI infrastructure product called LLMSlim.

The animation should loop seamlessly in 6–8 seconds.

Visual Story

A large developer prompt appears inside a beautiful code editor.

↓

The prompt flows into a semantic processing engine.

↓

The text intelligently separates into semantic chunks.

↓

Chunks travel through an animated ranking engine.

↓

Low-priority chunks fade away.

↓

Important instructions glow and remain.

↓

Everything recombines into a much smaller prompt.

↓

A metric dashboard animates:

• -52% Tokens
• Instructions Preserved ✓
• Entities Preserved ✓
• $ Saved increases smoothly

↓

A glowing badge appears:

40–70% Token Reduction

Style

Premium developer tools.
Minimal.
Elegant.
No cheesy AI effects.
No robots.
No brains.
No holograms.
Use subtle gradients.
Rounded geometry.
Glassmorphism.
Blue/cyan/violet accents.
Dark background.
Animation should feel like Stripe, Vercel and Validation Cloud.

Output should be vector-friendly and easily exportable as SVG animation, Lottie or Rive.
